description: Change the default settings for the 'envoy-gateway' plugin

version.description: Version of Envoy Gateway helm chart

namespace.description: Namespace where Envoy Gateway and CRs should be installed

kubectlRegistry.description: Registry to use instead of ghcr.io for qubership-docker-kubectl image

releaseName.description: Release name for Envoy Gateway helm chart

crReleaseName.description: Release name for Envoy Gateway CRs helm chart

valuesOverride.description: Override values for Envoy Gateway helm chart

crValuesOverride.description: Override values for Envoy Gateway CR helm chart

certificate.description: Configure TLS certificates to use on HTTPS listener

hostPorts.description: Configure hostPorts to use for HTTP and HTTPS listeners
